title: 1 Litre Motivational Fitness Sport Water Bottles with Straw & Time Maker, Leakproof BPA-free WITH Carry Strap Plastic Drink Bottle 1L Design for Girls, Boy Running,cycling (Purple-Pink Gradient)
features: Time Marker & Motivational quotes - 32oz motivational water bottle with times to drink and inspirational quotes, it's great for measuring your daily water intake, ensuring you stay hydrated, and motivating you to drink more. Our water bottles will make you better achieve fitness goals, including weight loss, appetite control, and overall health.

Leakproof & Functional Design - Simply open with one hand by clicking the button, The flip-top lid is designed with a secure lock, making it dust-proof and leak-proof. The water bottle with a straw makes you drink more easily. The wide mouth is easy to fit ice cubes, and also easy to clean. (bonus cleaning brush)

Lightweight carry - The water bottle is equipped with a carry strap and is very lightweight, allowing you to easily carry it anywhere. Whether it is fitness, cycling, hiking, or camping, you can carry it easily and keep yourself with sufficient moisture at all times!
Multi-colors & Customer service - Our water bottles have a variety of colors to choose from.
description: 1L Water Bottle with Time Marker And Straw Leakproof BPA Free with Carry Strap
